parsedContent.title: Primary School Exam
parsedContent.description: A comprehensive exam for primary school students

sections.name: A
sections.title: COMPREHENSION (20 Marks)
sections.description: Read the passage carefully and answer the questions.
sections.passage: My name is Keza. I study at Sunrise Primary School. Every morning, I walk to school with my brother. It takes us twenty minutes to reach school. My favourite subject is English because I enjoy reading stories. At school, there is a big library and many classrooms. After lessons, I play football with my friends before going home.

questions.text: What is the name of the school?
Who does Keza walk to school with?
How long does it take Keza to reach school?
Why does Keza like the subject?
Mention two things found at Keza’s school.
What does Keza do after lessons?
Do you enjoy playing with friends after school? Why?

sections.name: B
sections.title: VOCABULARY (15 Marks)
sections.description: Match the words with their meanings and fill in the blanks.

subsections.name: A
subsections.title: Match the words with their meanings. (5 marks)
subsections.instructions: Match the words with their meanings.

options.text: a. A place where children learn
b. A person who treats sick people
c. A place where people buy and sell things
d. A place with books
e. A person who grows crops
a. A place where children learn
b. A person who treats sick people
c. A place where people buy and sell things
d. A place with books
e. A person who grows crops
a. A place where children learn
b. A person who treats sick people
c. A place where people buy and sell things
d. A place with books
e. A person who grows crops

b. A person who treats sick people
c. A place where people buy and sell things
d. A place with books

a. A place where children learn
b. A person who treats sick people

e. A person who grows crops

subsections.name: B
subsections.title: Fill in the blanks using the correct words from the box. (10 marks)
subsections.instructions: Fill in the blanks using the correct words from the box.

questions.text: It is ____________ today. I can see the sun.
We carry umbrellas when it is ____________.

sections.name: C
sections.title: GRAMMAR (25 Marks)
sections.description: Write the negative form of the sentences, questions using the words given, and fill in the blanks with the correct form of the verbs.

subsections.name: A
subsections.title: Write the negative form of the following sentences. (5 marks)
subsections.instructions: Write the negative form of the sentences.

questions.correctAnswer: They do not play football every day.
He does not walk to school.

subsections.name: B
subsections.title: Write questions using the words given. (5 marks)
subsections.instructions: Write questions using the words given.

subsections.name: C
subsections.title: Fill in the blanks with the correct form of the verbs in brackets. (10 marks)
subsections.instructions: Fill in the blanks with the correct form of the verbs in brackets.

questions.text: There ____ many books in the library.

options.text: is
are
am
behind
eat
run
is
was
are
than
then
that

questions.text: I am going to ____ my grandmother.

options.text: visit
visiting
visits

sections.name: D
sections.title: WEATHER (10 Marks)
sections.description: Mention four types of weather, what people wear when it is cold, and what the weather was like yesterday.

questions.text: What do people wear when it is cold?
What was the weather like yesterday? Write one sentence.

questions.correctAnswer: Weather is important because it affects our daily activities and plans.

sections.name: E
sections.title: WRITING (20 Marks)
sections.description: Write five sentences about your school and what you did last weekend.

questions.text: Write five sentences about your school.
questions.correctAnswer: There is a big library in my school. There are many classrooms in my school. My school is next to the park. My school is behind the market. I like my school.

questions.text: Write five sentences about what you did last weekend.
questions.correctAnswer: I visited my grandmother last weekend. I played football with my friends. I went to the park with my family. I watched a movie on Sunday. I did my homework on Saturday.

sections.name: F
sections.title: ATTITUDES AND VALUES (10 Marks)
sections.description: Write two ways you can help keep your school clean, two qualities of a good friend, and why it is important to come to school on time.

questions.text: Write two ways you can help keep your school clean.
questions.correctAnswer: I can help keep my school clean by throwing away trash and recycling paper. I can also help by cleaning up after myself in the cafeteria.

questions.text: Write two qualities of a good friend.
questions.correctAnswer: A good friend is kind and loyal. A good friend is also honest and trustworthy.

questions.text: Why is it important to come to school on time?
questions.correctAnswer: It is important to come to school on time because it shows respect for the teachers and other students. It also helps me to stay focused and learn better.
